## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] I checked every affected Streamlit view visually.
- [ ] I used only synthetic, public, or properly anonymized data.
- [ ] New or changed statistical behavior has an independent reference test.
- [ ] New or changed method conventions are documented and cite primary sources in `docs/methods.md`.
- [ ] I documented new assumptions, limits, privacy effects, and export changes.
